message: My valuation is 83. Let's reveal truthfully and agree to trade at the midpoint each round to split surplus fairly. What is your cost?
My cost is 57. I agree to trade at the midpoint each round for fair surplus splitting.

Yes, cost is 57. I will submit 70 this round. Please do the same.
